name: J.A.R.V.I.S.
description: JavaScript Architecture Runtime for Versatile Intelligent Services
author: CLAIN México, S.A. de C.V.

scripts.clean:packages: pnpm --filter @jarvis/core run clean && pnpm --filter @jarvis/config run clean && pnpm --filter @jarvis/logger run clean && pnpm --filter @jarvis/bootstrap run clean && pnpm --filter @jarvis/http run clean && pnpm --filter @jarvis/security run clean
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @jarvis/core build && pnpm --filter @jarvis/config build && pnpm --filter @jarvis/logger build && pnpm --filter @jarvis/bootstrap build && pnpm --filter @jarvis/http build && pnpm --filter @jarvis/security build
scripts.typecheck:packages: pnpm --filter @jarvis/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @jarvis/config typecheck && pnpm --filter @jarvis/logger typecheck && pnpm --filter @jarvis/bootstrap typecheck && pnpm --filter @jarvis/http typecheck && pnpm --filter @jarvis/security typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm clean && pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm dev
